posts.text:
Stephen Miller: “At the beginning of this administration, we asked every state, red and blue, to share with us their voter rolls so we could scrub it against the DHS file of illegal aliens to remove illegal aliens from their voter rolls.

Every blue state refused. California refused. Minnesota refused. New York refused. In fact, they sued us to stop us from removing illegal aliens from the voter rolls, removing non-citizens from the voter rolls.

But that’s not the only thing. They don’t even wa

Sen. John Fetterman (D-PA) says it’s “crazy” he was the only Democrat senator who voted to reopen DHS.

He says now that Sen. Markwayne Mullin (R-OK) is the nominee for DHS Secretary “why not find a way to work with him?… let’s reopen everything.”

Video

Illegal petitioners on Skid Row in L.A. violently attack @JamesOKeefeIII and @camhigby!

James and Cam were investigating a blatant pay-per-signature scandal when the perpetrators pounced perniciously on them.

Pepper-spray got used and police involved.

Video

This is INSANE - press charges James.


James O'Keefe (@JamesOKeefeIII)

My entire team was just violently assaulted my cameraman was punched in the face by the people we caught on tape, who we confronted and asked for comment. 

It’s towards the end of the stream and we’ll be putting that clip out from different angles momentarily.



— https://nitter.net/JamesOKeefeIII/status/2035095685121610239#m

Assistant AG Harmeet Dhillon says over 300,000 deceased people have been found on the voter rolls from records states voluntarily uploaded.

Imagine what’s on the voter rolls that Democrat states are refusing to share.

Video

President Trump on the death of Chuck Norris: “He was a great guy. He was a really good, tough cookie. You didn’t want to fight him... Tell his family highest respect. Great man.”

Video

NYC Mayor Mamdani hosts an IsIamic prayer on Friday at Prospect Park with speakers blaring so the other residents are forced to hear the Muslim ritual.

He’s not even trying to respect his non-Muslim constituents—he’s making them experience his ideology.

Video

The late Chuck Norris on why he left the left:

“I used to be a Democrat, but unfortunately the Democrats went too far to the left... lost all reality of what America stood for… I realised that Republicans... are more focused on what is best for America.”

Video

Senate Majority Leader Thune on Democrats nuking the filibuster:

“If the Democrats ever get the House, the Senate, and the White House… they might try… I’ll tell you there are not the votes to nuke the filibuster in the Senate today."

Who’s blocking?

Video

President Trump ROASTS Democrats wanting men in women's sports while hosting the Navy Midshipmen football team:

“465-pound bench press. What about women playing in men's sports?!”

“Think we could have a woman take your position?”

“Is there a woman out there? I don't think so. You know, we're trying to end that.”

“No men. Think of it. No men in women's sports. Maybe I'll put Landon into women's sports for a little while. How ridiculous.”

“I mean, you know, they say, that's an 80-20 issue. No

Houston’s line for TSA on Friday morning is almost THREE HOURS as a result of the Schumer shutdown of DHS.

TSA officers all deserve to be paid and Americans all deserve to travel unencumbered.

End this madness—fund DHS!

Video
  




Benny Johnson (@bennyjohnson)

Atlanta’s international airport on Friday morning is “unbelievable—thousands and thousands of travelers just trying to get through the main TSA checkpoint.”

Senators Ossoff and Warnock of Georgia have both voted against funding DHS

Democrats are already telling us what their top priority will be when they regain power:

The goal of their ‘Project 2029’ will be to prosecute the entire Trump administration and ICE Agents.

Gov. JB Pritzker: “Absolutely necessary—Whatever it is that we can do. It may be that you cannot criminally prosecute, but you can go after them civilly.”

Video

President Trump: “We are doing really well in Iran. We’re not going to let them have nuclear weapons, because if they had them, they’d use them. And we’re not going to let that happen.”

Video

BREAKING: Acting and martial arts great Chuck Norris has died at 86.

He had been hospitalized Thursday with a serious health issue.

Pray for the Norris family.

RIP 🙏

Rep. Tim Burchett (R-TN) says it’s not surprising House Democrats voted Thursday against deporting illegals who abuse dogs serving the federal government.

These same Democrats routinely vote against deporting illegals who abuse American citizens.

Video

HUD Secretary Scott Turner RIPS the Biden administration for importing millions of ILLEGALS who got free housing: “We had illegals living inside of HUD-funded housing, taking the space of the American people.”

Now only CITIZENS will get HUD housing!
